truffles.dose_note: NOTE: Dry truffles are reported to be several times more potent than the dosages listed for wet.
truffles.name: truffles

properties.dose: Wet Light: 5g, Common: 10g, Heavy: 15g+ | Dry Light: 0.5-1.5g Common: 1.5-4g Heavy: 4g+
properties.effects: visual distortion, color enhancement, sense of conection with nature, sense of well being, sense of wonder, closed eye visuals, tactile enhancement
properties.summary: Truffles (magic truffles, sclerotium) are the thickened root sections of psilocybin mushrooms. Like psilocybin mushrooms, truffles contain the psychoactive chemicals psilocybin and psilocin.
